KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIRACLE_SHRINE_MAIDEN_KOIS: As you sit down to rest, a green-haired shrine maiden suddenly comes into view. Someone may have mentioned her before.
Call out to the unfamiliar shrine maiden.

You call out to her and talk for a while. She has been wandering through this Spire, with no idea how to get home.
From what she says, it sounds like there are two elders at home she has to care for.
Of course, she warmly offers to lend you some help.
Obtain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random Rare cards and a unique Curse.
You are already exhausted, with no room in your heart for a stranger in shrine maiden clothes.

After accepting her blessing, you feel the sinister air around you fade away.
By the time the blessing settles, the shrine maiden is already gone.

You take the little omamori and hang it from your trusted weapon.
You feel it may drive your fears away.

Who came up with such a strange dance?
You learned a few odd techniques from it, but you will never forget the dance for the rest of your life.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-LAMPREY_GRILL_STAND_KOISHI:
As you hurry along, your vision suddenly goes dark.
A strange song drifts in from afar, accompanied by a vivid red glow.
With nothing else to follow, you trace the song and the light until you arrive before a grill stand.
The proprietress looks rather delicious.
Spend [gold]{SetMealCost}[/gold] Gold. Heal [blue]{SetMealHeal}[/blue] HP and randomly upgrade [blue]{SetMealUpgrades}[/blue] card.
Order an Oedo Boat Festival and Fourteenth Night!
Spend [gold]{FestivalCost}[/gold] Gold. Heal [blue]{FestivalHeal}[/blue] HP and randomly upgrade [blue]{FestivalUpgrades}[/blue] cards.

You eat to your heart's content and soon set off again.
Still, something feels a little off.

After a fierce struggle, the proprietress curls up in the corner and begs for mercy.
You are exhausted, which only makes you want to eat her more.
In the end, a yamabiko stops you. The proprietress immediately gives you everything edible she has.
A feather also happens to fall in.
